definition: A large town house or mansion; a grand private residence, especially in France.
example: We need to understand the concept of hotel.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về khách sạn.

definition: Opportunity or scope (to do something).
example: We need to understand the concept of room.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về phòng.

definition: A piece of furniture, usually flat and soft, on which to rest or sleep.
example:
My cat often sleeps on my bed.
I keep a glass of water next to my bed when I sleep.
exampleVi:
Con mèo của tôi thường ngủ trên giường của tôi.
Tôi để một cốc nước cạnh giường khi ngủ.

definition: An object designed to open and close a lock.
example: We need to understand the concept of key.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về chìa khóa.

definition: The act of receiving.
example: We need to understand the concept of reception.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tiếp nhận.

definition: A table, frame, or case, in past centuries usually with a sloping top but now usually with a flat top, for the use of writers and readers. It often has a drawer or repository underneath.
example: We need to understand the concept of desk.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bàn làm việc.

definition: An entryway or reception area; vestibule; passageway; corridor.
example: I had to wait in the lobby for hours before seeing the doctor.
exampleVi: Tôi phải đợi ở hành lang hàng giờ mới được gặp bác sĩ.

definition: A recipient of hospitality, specifically someone staying by invitation at the house of another.
example: The guests were let in by the butler.
exampleVi: Người quản gia cho khách vào.

definition: One which receives or entertains a guest, socially, commercially, or officially.
example: A good host is always considerate of the guest’s needs.
exampleVi: Một chủ nhà tốt luôn quan tâm đến nhu cầu của khách.

definition: (plural staffs or staves) A long, straight, thick wooden rod or stick, especially one used to assist in walking.
example: We need to understand the concept of staff.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nhân viên.

definition: An act of being of assistance to someone.
example: I say I did him a service by ending our relationship – now he can freely pursue his career.
exampleVi: Tôi nói rằng tôi đã giúp ích cho anh ấy bằng cách chấm dứt mối quan hệ của chúng tôi - giờ anh ấy có thể tự do theo đuổi sự nghiệp của mình.

definition: A collection of sheets of paper bound together to hinge at one edge, containing printed or written material, pictures, etc.
example: He was frustrated because he couldn't find anything about dinosaurs in the book.
exampleVi: Anh ấy thất vọng vì không thể tìm thấy bất cứ điều gì về khủng long trong cuốn sách.

definition: (behaviour) Restriction.
example: We need to understand the concept of reserve.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm dự trữ.

definition: The act of reserving, withholding or keeping back.
example: The committee authorised the reservation of funds.
exampleVi: Ủy ban đã cho phép dự trữ tiền.

definition: A situation in which the king is directly threatened by an opposing piece.
example: We need to understand the concept of check.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm kiểm tra.

definition: A position of power or influence, or a way to get it.
example: His parents got him an in with the company.
exampleVi: Cha mẹ anh ấy đã cho anh ấy gia nhập công ty.

definition: A means of exit, escape, reprieve, etc.
example: They wrote the law to give those organizations an out.
exampleVi: Họ viết ra luật để cho những tổ chức đó có một lối thoát.

definition: Any of various bladed or pointed hand weapons, originally designating an Anglo-Saxon sword, and later a weapon of infantry, especially in the 14th and 15th centuries, commonly consisting of a broad, heavy, double-edged, hook-shaped blade, with a short pike at the back and another at the top, attached to the end of a long staff.
example: We need to understand the concept of bill.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hóa đơn.

definition: Continuance or a period of time spent in a place; abode for an indefinite time; sojourn.
example: I hope you enjoyed your stay in Hawaii.
exampleVi: Tôi hy vọng bạn thích kỳ nghỉ ở Hawaii.

definition: Pleasantness.
example: We especially enjoyed the amenity of the climate on our last holiday.
exampleVi: Chúng tôi đặc biệt thích thú với sự thoải mái của khí hậu trong kỳ nghỉ vừa qua.

definition: The process of checking out of a hotel, or the latest time to vacate a room in one.
example: We need to understand the concept of checkout.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thanh toán.

definition: The act of occupying, the state of being occupied or the state of being an occupant or tenant.
example: We need to understand the concept of occupancy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về sự chiếm hữu.

definition: The worth of something; value.
example: We need to understand the concept of rate.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tỷ lệ.

definition: To reserve (something) for future use.
example: I can book tickets for the concert next week.
exampleVi: Tôi có thể đặt vé cho buổi hòa nhạc vào tuần tới.

definition: The act or service of welcoming, receiving, hosting, or entertaining guests.
example: Please thank our hosts for their hospitality during the week that we stayed.
exampleVi: Xin hãy cảm ơn chủ nhà vì lòng hiếu khách của họ trong tuần chúng tôi ở lại.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word checkin.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ checkin.

definition: An unoccupied position or job.
example: We need to understand the concept of vacancy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chỗ trống.

definition: (usually a mass noun) Lodging in a dwelling or similar living quarters afforded to travellers in hotels or on cruise ships, or prisoners, etc.
example: We need to understand the concept of accommodation.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chỗ ở.

definition: An employee of a hotel who carries a guest's luggage and runs errands.
example: We need to understand the concept of bellhop.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bellhop.

definition: One who attends to the wishes of hotel guests.
example: We need to understand the concept of concierge.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nhân viên hướng dẫn.

definition: A system of government-imposed duties levied on imported or exported goods; a list of such duties, or the duties themselves.
example: We need to understand the concept of tariff.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thuế quan.

definition: A maid who handles the chores in a bedroom.
example: We need to understand the concept of chambermaid.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hầu phòng.

definition: A person who carries luggage and related objects.
example: By the time I reached the train station I was exhausted, but fortunately there was a porter waiting.
exampleVi: Lúc tới ga xe lửa tôi đã kiệt sức nhưng may mắn thay đã có người khuân vác chờ sẵn.

definition: The chores of maintaining a house as a residence, especially cleaning.
example: We need to understand the concept of housekeeping.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm dọn phòng.

definition: Facilities for urination and defecation: a toilet; a lavatory.
example: We need to understand the concept of facilities.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm cơ sở vật chất.

definition: A man's personal male attendant, responsible for his clothes and appearance.
example: We need to understand the concept of valet.

definition: A female host.
example: The host and hostess greeted their guests at the door.
exampleVi: Ông chủ và bà chủ đón khách ở cửa.

definition: One who dines.
example: We need to understand the concept of diner.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm quán ăn.

definition: One who protects or supports; a defender or advocate.
example: We need to understand the concept of patron.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm người bảo trợ.

definition: A person, animal or plant living at a certain location or in a certain area.
example: The tiger lily is a resident of Asia.
exampleVi: Hoa huệ hổ là cư dân của châu Á.

definition: A person who holds open the door at the entrance to a building, summons taxicabs, and provides an element of security; in apartment buildings, he also accepts deliveries and may perform certain concierge type services.
example: We need to understand the concept of doorman.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm người gác cửa.

definition: The act of signing up or registering for something.
example: Complete the registration process.
exampleVi: Hoàn tất quá trình đăng ký.
